arts.sum: The lineups for Tuesday's UEFA Nations League clash between Hungary and Germany have been announced.

arts.ttl: Germany's soccer team wants to focus on playing and not politics
arts.sum: Human rights are an issue again with Saudi Arabia set to be confirmed as host of the 2034 World Cup at a FIFA congress on Dec. 11. “We saw in Qatar (at the 2022 World Cup) that too many political issues can harm a team,” Nagelsmann told broadcaster NTV on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Nagelsmann hints at starting spot for "world-class" Sané
arts.sum: At a press conference on Monday, Julian Nagelsmann strongly indicated that Leroy Sané will start against Hungary.

arts.ttl: Hungary vs Germany – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Hungary host what is expected to be a heavily rotated Germany team on Tuesday evening in their final group game of the Uefa Nations League. This game is effectively a dead rubber as Die Mannschaft secured top spot with a game to spare, while the Magyars have avoided automatic relegation to League B. Hungary could […] The post Hungary vs Germany – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Hungary coach Szalai ‘doing well’ after collapse against Oranje, but won’t be present for Germany clash
arts.sum: Adam Szalai says he is "doing well" following his collapse on Saturday yet won't be present as Hungary take on Germany at the Puskas Arena.

arts.ttl: UEFA Nations League: Who can Germany face in the quarter-finals?
arts.sum: The League A knockout stage draw then determines the four quarter-final ties between the League A group winners and runners-up, as well as the pairings for the semi-finals next June. The draw for the quarter-finals, which has been introduced in the Nations League for the first time in the 2024/25 edition, will take place on Friday 22 November at 12pm CET at UEFA headquarters in Nyon.

arts.ttl: Hungary vs Germany Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Hungary and Germany have nothing to play for heading into their final UEFA Nations League group game of the year. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predic...

arts.ttl: Why extending Kimmich's contract could prove difficult for Bayern
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are expected to step up their efforts to secure a contract extension for Joshua Kimmich, but it could prove to be a difficult task.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Nations League predictions including Hungary vs. Germany
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Nations League fixtures, including Hungary vs. Germany.

arts.ttl: Report: Newcastle are scouting ‘exceptional’ playmaker who plays just like Dominik Szoboszlai
